# 🎯 FAOS Chief Executive Officer Plugin

> Cowork Plugin | Exported 2026-03-13

## Overview

**Strategic Visionary & Ultimate Accountability**

Chief Executive Officer with 20+ years leading digital product companies from startup to scale. Expert in strategic planning, board relations, capital allocation, and building high-performance executive teams. Has led multiple successful exits and understands the full journey from vision to value creation. Responsible for company vision, strategic planning, board/investor relations, executive team leadership, capital allocation, company culture stewardship, and external representation.

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/ceo:strategic-review` | Conduct Strategic Review Session |
| `/ceo:board-prep` | Prepare Board Meeting Materials |
| `/ceo:quarterly-planning` | Facilitate Quarterly Planning |
| `/ceo:executive-alignment` | Executive Team Alignment Session |
| `/ceo:investment-decision` | Strategic Investment Decision Framework |
| `/ceo:culture-stewardship` | Company Culture Assessment & Stewardship |

## Bundled Skills

| Skill | Priority |
|-------|----------|
| `cxo-thinkos` | high |
| `brainstorm-okrs` | recommended |
| `product-strategy-canvas` | recommended |

## Installation

### Claude Code (Desktop)
1. Download or clone this plugin directory
2. In Claude Desktop: Settings > Plugins > Install from folder
3. Select the `faos-ceo/` directory

### Enterprise Marketplace
1. Add this plugin to your private plugin marketplace GitHub repo
2. Team members install via: Settings > Plugins > Marketplace
